_note: Real shape of Wholesale Electrics IN391901 as it reaches save_invoice_to_db AFTER the negative-deduction-line fix (post-transform, pre-reconcile). The kit line TPSM0450 is net of its 45% settlement (107.66); FH-01 is a bundled VARME sensor the supplier REMOVED, posted as qty -1 / total_amount -33.00 (a DEDUCTION). With that deduction line RETAINED, the line-sum is 107.66 - 33.00 + 45.00 = 119.66, which ties to the stated net, gross-minus-tax (125.64-5.98) and goods-minus-settlement (207.74-88.08). Before the fix the -33 line was dropped, the line-sum was 152.66, and the validator (correctly) blocked. This fixture proves the deduction is what makes it tie LEGITIMATELY — the validator is never skipped.
